What You’ll Learn

Our Curriculum

A structured, personal path tailored to where you are right now.

﷽
Beginners

Quran Reading Foundation

Arabic alphabet to fluent Quran reading — from absolute zero, step by step.

Beginners

Quran Reading Foundation

  • Arabic alphabet & pronunciation
  • Joining letters and forming words
  • Vowel marks (Harakaat) mastery
  • Basic Tajweed rules introduced gradually
  • Short Surahs and daily prayers
  • Building reading fluency and confidence
۞
Hifz Program

Quran Memorisation

Memorize the Quran at your own pace with a personal daily plan and revision cycles.

Hifz Program

Quran Memorisation

  • Personalised Hifz plan at your pace
  • Daily new lesson + same-day revision
  • Weekly and monthly revision cycles
  • Teacher tracks every Juz personally
  • Memorisation techniques and motivation
  • Complete Hifz with strong long-term retention
ﻵ
Tajweed

Rules of Recitation

Master the science of proper Quran pronunciation and beautiful recitation.

Tajweed

Rules of Recitation

  • Makharij al-Huroof (articulation points)
  • Sifaat al-Huroof (letter characteristics)
  • Noon & Meem Sakinah rules
  • Madd (elongation) rules
  • Waqf & Ibtida (stopping & starting)
  • Advanced intermediate Tajweed rulings
★
Advanced

Revision & Strengthening

For Huffaz — strengthen your memorization with long-term retention plans.

Advanced

Revision & Strengthening

  • Full Quran revision for Huffaz
  • Speed and fluency improvement
  • Granular Tajweed correction sessions
  • Advanced recitation refinement
  • One-to-one teacher recitation review
  • Long-term Hifz protection plan

About Us

Al Kanz Academy

Al Kanz — meaning “The Treasure” — was founded on one belief: that the Quran belongs to everyone. No one should be held back by age, schedule, or circumstance.

Our teachers don’t just teach — they guide, motivate, and walk alongside every student on their journey.

We run one-to-one classes only. No batches. No shortcuts. Just real, personal attention.

FAQ

Common
Questions

Can't find your answer?

Contact us →

  • What does Al Kanz Academy offer?

    Al Kanz Academy offers dedicated online Quran Hifz and Tajweed classes for all ages and levels.

  • Are the classes in groups or 1-on-1?

    All of our classes are personalized, 1-on-1 sessions — just you and your teacher — ensuring focused, genuine progress without distractions.

  • Where are the classes held?

    Classes are 100% online via Google Meet, so you can learn from the comfort of your own home, anywhere in the world.

  • Who are the teachers?

    Our instructors are certified, vetted male and female teachers with years of experience in Quranic education.

  • Is there an age limit?

    No. We welcome everyone from ages 4 to 80+, ensuring every learner has a teacher waiting for them.

  • Do female students get female teachers?

    Yes. Female students are strictly matched with female teachers, providing a safe and comfortable learning environment.

  • Is Al Kanz available internationally?

    Yes. Our online platform is accessible globally and our international registrations are currently open.

  • What languages are classes taught in?

    We teach in English, Malayalam, Urdu, and Tamil.

  • How long is each class?

    Each personalized session is 30 minutes long.

  • How many days a week do I need to attend?

    Our standard structure is 3 sessions a week, ensuring steady and genuine progress.

  • Can I choose my own schedule?

    Yes. We offer complete flexibility — morning, afternoon, or evening. Simply let us know your preference and we will arrange accordingly.

  • What is the enrollment process?

    It's simple: send us a message on WhatsApp, have a short conversation with a teacher to assess your level, agree on a schedule that fits your routine, then your private classes begin.

  • How can I contact the academy for help?

    Students have direct WhatsApp access to stay connected and get guidance anytime.

  • Can I join if I don't know any Arabic?

    Absolutely. Our Beginners curriculum starts from absolute zero, guiding you step by step through the Arabic alphabet, pronunciation, and beyond.

  • What will I learn in the Beginners course?

    You will learn the Arabic alphabet and pronunciation, how to join letters and form words, and master vowel marks (Harakaat).

  • Will I learn actual Surahs in the Beginners course?

    Yes. The foundation course gradually introduces basic Tajweed rules and helps you learn short Surahs and daily prayers while building reading fluency.

  • How does the Hifz program work?

    The Hifz program lets you memorize the Quran at your own pace using a personalized daily plan crafted around your schedule and ability.

  • How do you ensure I don't forget what I memorize?

    We use a strong long-term retention strategy: a daily new lesson paired with same-day revision, plus structured weekly and monthly revision cycles.

  • Will my progress be tracked?

    Yes. Your dedicated teacher personally tracks every Juz to monitor your progress and keep you motivated throughout the journey.

  • What is the focus of the Tajweed course?

    This course focuses on mastering the science of proper Quran pronunciation and beautiful recitation.

  • What specific rules are covered?

    Students learn Makharij al-Huroof (articulation points), Sifaat al-Huroof (letter characteristics), Noon and Meem Sakinah rules, and Madd (elongation) rules.

  • Will I learn when to pause during recitation?

    Yes. The curriculum covers Waqf and Ibtida — the rules for stopping and starting — alongside advanced intermediate Tajweed rulings.

  • Do you have a program for those who are already Huffaz?

    Yes. Our Advanced curriculum is built specifically for Huffaz who want to strengthen their memorization with long-term retention plans.

  • What does the Advanced program cover?

    It includes full Quran revision for Huffaz, speed and fluency improvement, and a long-term Hifz protection plan.

  • Will the Advanced program fix recitation errors?

    Yes. It features 1-on-1 teacher recitation reviews for granular Tajweed correction and advanced recitation refinement.
